insights_text:
============================================================
  SMART SALES RECOMMENDATIONS
============================================================

[1] 🌸 Seasonality  |  High Priority
    📌 Festive is peak season (season lasts 2 months)
    Highest intensity: 81,412 units/month. Raw total: 162,823 units.
    ✅ Ramp stock 4–6 weeks before Festive. Prioritise Electronics & Fashion bundles for Festive.

[2] 🌍 Area  |  High Priority
    📌 North is top zone
    Contributes 26.1% of revenue.
    ✅ Increase delivery slots, warehouse space, and ad spend in North.

[3] 📊 Growth  |  High Priority
    📌 -46.1% 3-month decline
    Sales falling — needs attention.
    ✅ Audit top categories for stock-outs, pricing issues, or delivery failures.

[4] 📈 Forecasting  |  Medium Priority
    📌 Slowdown expected
    Forecast avg (3018) is 50.3% below recent (6074).
    ✅ Reduce inventory orders. Launch promotions to clear existing stock.

[5] 📈 Forecasting  |  Medium Priority
    📌 High forecast volatility
    CV = 21.0% — demand is unpredictable.
    ✅ Keep 20% safety stock buffer. Review supplier lead times.

[6] 🌸 Seasonality  |  Medium Priority
    📌 Winter is slowest season
    Lowest intensity: 42,845 units/month.
    ✅ Run clearance sales in Winter. Offer free shipping + combo deals.

[7] 🌍 Area  |  Medium Priority
    📌 Gap: North vs Nan
    25.0% revenue gap.
    ✅ Reduce delivery fees in Nan. Investigate stock availability.

[8] 🌍 Area  |  Medium Priority
    📌 Low-performer clusters: Nan
    KMeans flagged these zones across all metrics.
    ✅ Run zone-specific promotions. Lower delivery fees to stimulate demand.

[9] 💰 Pricing  |  Medium Priority
    📌 Protein Powder is price-insensitive
    Elasticity = -0.22. Demand holds despite price rises.
    ✅ Raise Protein Powder prices 5–8%. Revenue-max price: ₹491.0.

[10] 💰 Pricing  |  Medium Priority
    📌 Peanut Butter is price-insensitive
    Elasticity = -0.20. Demand holds despite price rises.
    ✅ Raise Peanut Butter prices 5–8%. Revenue-max price: ₹251.0.

[11] 💰 Pricing  |  Medium Priority
    📌 Almonds is price-insensitive
    Elasticity = -0.02. Demand holds despite price rises.
    ✅ Raise Almonds prices 5–8%. Revenue-max price: ₹792.0.

[12] 💰 Pricing  |  Medium Priority
    📌 Chana Sattu is price-insensitive
    Elasticity = -0.01. Demand holds despite price rises.
    ✅ Raise Chana Sattu prices 5–8%. Revenue-max price: ₹125.0.

[13] 💰 Pricing  |  Medium Priority
    📌 Paneer is price-insensitive
    Elasticity = -0.20. Demand holds despite price rises.
    ✅ Raise Paneer prices 5–8%. Revenue-max price: ₹381.0.

[14] 💰 Pricing  |  Medium Priority
    📌 Curd is price-insensitive
    Elasticity = -0.07. Demand holds despite price rises.
    ✅ Raise Curd prices 5–8%. Revenue-max price: ₹43.0.
